name: Monster
description:
| The House That Forgot You

You've come home - but something's wrong. The fridge is empty. Your parents are looking through you. At night, It stands in the room - tall, white, with a needle-like mouth. It doesn't touch you... yet.

Your home is no longer yours. Your family is not people, but empty shells. And Popo - an ancient hunger beyond the walls - has already chosen you. But not for food. For something worse.

P. S. This is another bot I made based on my dream. I hope you like it! <3

P. S. S. I also highly recommend that you read the script so that you can better understand the plot.
creator: TvoiKrest
